content: Remote OK Social Media Coordinator The Sociable Society <p><strong>Full-Time | Remote (US and Canada Only Applicants)</strong></p><p><br></p><p><strong>Social Media Coordinator</strong></p><p><br></p><p><strong>About The Sociable Society (TSS)</strong></p><p>At The Sociable Society, we connect social media personalities with world-renowned brands to create direct consumer marketing campaigns that target niche audiences. We take a personal, human-first approach to ensure our Brand and Creator partnerships result in creative campaigns that captivate and enrich audiences every time.</p><p><br></p><p>We are forward-thinking, digitally minded entrepreneurs, and we bring this mindset into how we work every day. We are looking for a team member who will contribute to our creative, entrepreneurial culture and grow with us as we continue to scale.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>About the Role</strong></p><p>The Sociable Society is looking for a Social Media Coordinator to join their growing Marketing Team!&nbsp;This role will be responsible for ideating and creating social-first content for the agencyâs main social media channels, including Instagram, TikTok &amp; Linkedin. As a creator management agency, the purpose of our channels is to offer a behind the scenes perspective to what goes into influencer marketing, highlighting our creatorâs and agencyâs wins, and interacting with our roster as well as prospective talent. The ideal candidate will be able to adapt to our brand voice, create content that focuses on the purposes of our channels while still adapting to the trends of each platform&nbsp;&nbsp;</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Core Responsibilities</strong></p><p><br></p><p><strong>Content Creation &amp; Publishing</strong></p><p><br></p><ul><li>Ideate, create and edit social-first content including Reels, TikToks, Stories, and carousels&nbsp;</li><li>Schedule and publish content across Instagram, TikTok &amp; LinkedIn</li><li>Support optimization of content for each platform (formatting, captions, trending audio and timing)</li><li>Consistently manage and update content calendars to ensure timely publishing</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Community Management</strong></p><p><br></p><ul><li>Monitor comments, DMs, and tagged content across platforms</li><li>Engage with audiences in a timely, brand-appropriate voice</li><li>Identify opportunities to drive engagement and conversation</li><li>Escalate any sensitive inquiries to the larger team </li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Event Content Support</strong></p><p><br></p><ul><li>Maintain organized content libraries for brand partners for event related campaigns</li><li>Coordinate assets from photographers &amp; videographers including shot lists and edits</li><li>Assist in conceptualizing content moments for events, and creating social-first strategies for on-site capture. </li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Reporting &amp; Performance Tracking</strong></p><p><br></p><ul><li>Pull and track performance data using Meta Business Suite &amp; TikTok Studio&nbsp;</li><li>Assist in building monthly analytics reports&nbsp;</li><li>Monitor engagement trends and top-performing content</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Experience Required:</strong></p><ul><li>2-3 years experience in social media, content creation, or digital marketing&nbsp;</li><li>Proficient in editing tools such as: CapCut, Premiere Pro, Canva or other editing tools</li><li>Strong understanding of Instagram, TikTok, and short-form video trends</li><li>An understanding of social media metrics and tracking tools&nbsp;</li><li>Great writing skills and attention to detail&nbsp;</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Why Join TSS</strong></p><ul><li>Work with top creators and global brands</li><li>Flexible, fully remote work environment</li><li>Opportunities for professional development and growth</li><li>Collaborative, supportive, and fun team culture</li></ul> exec, content writing, marketing Toronto, Toronto, Ontario, Canada 2026-06-12T23:25:39+00:00 1133362 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-social-media-coordinator-the-sociable-society-1133362 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Junior Human Resources Assistant Helic & Co.
